evaluation.summary: The experiment timed out after 120 seconds, so no definitive results were obtained to assess the LDAB model under base‑specific digit constraints.
next_directions: Implement algorithmic optimizations (e.g., memoization, early termination) to reduce computation time.
Allocate more powerful computational resources or distribute the workload across a cluster.
Run smaller‑scale pilot tests to verify correctness before attempting the full primorial range analysis.
